translation: It is twenty-five years since I went forth, yet I have not attained even a moment's peace of mind.
literal_translation: Twenty-five years [it is], since gone forth I [am], even a finger-snap-measure, peace of mind I did not reach.

data.example_1:
paṇṇavīsativassāni,
yato pabbajitāya me,
n'ābhijānāmi cittassa,
samaṃ laddhaṃ kudācanaṃ.

components.example_1:
paṇṇavīsativassāni,
yato pabbajitā ahaṃ,
n'āccharāsaṅghātamattam'pi,
cittass'ūpasam'ajjhagaṃ.
ime pañca nīvaraṇe appahīne attani samanupassati
components.example_2:
ath'āparaṃ pañca rajāni loke,
yesaṃ satīmā vinayāya sikkhe,
rūpesu saddesu atho rasesu,
gandhesu phassesu sahetha rāgaṃ.

components.example_1: dissat'āyaṃ, bhikkhave, cātumahābhūtiko kāyo ekam'pi vassaṃ tiṭṭhamāno… vīsati'pi vassāni tiṭṭhamāno
components.example_2: pa, parā, ni, nī, u, du, saṃ, vi, ava, anu, pari, adhi, abhi, pati, su, ā, ati, api, apa, upa, pahāro, parābhavo, nihāro, nīhāro, uhāro, duhāro, saṃhāro, vihāro, avahāro, anuhāro, parihāro, adhihāro, abhihāro, patihāro, suhāro, āhāro, atihāro, apihāro, apahāro, upahāro, evaṃ vīsati upasaggehi ca.

components.example_1: dvīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bālo abyatto asappuriso khataṃ upahataṃ attānaṃ pariharati sāvajjo ca hoti sānuvajjo ca viññūnaṃ bahuñ'ca apuññaṃ pasavati
components.example_2: puthulato pana diyaḍḍharatanaṃ dvīsu passesu ratanamatt'ānucaṅkamaṃ dīghato saṭṭhihatthaṃ mudutalaṃ sama-vippakiṇṇa-vālukaṃ caṅkamaṃ vaṭṭati cetiyagirimhi dīpappasādaka-mahindattherassa caṅkamanaṃ viya, tādisaṃ taṃ ahosi.

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi brāhmaṇa kukkuṭiyā aṇḍāni aṭṭha vā dasa vā dvādasa vā
components.example_2: imehi kho, bhikkhave, dasahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu samantapāsādiko ca hoti sabb'ākāraparipūro cā'ti.

components.example_1: eso hi, bhikkhu, brahmā mahābrahmā abhibhū anabhibhūto aññadatthu'daso vasavattī issaro kattā nimmātā seṭṭho sajitā vasī pitā bhūtabhabyānaṃ.
components.example_2:
sammaddasā vedaguno,
samma'd'aññāya paṇḍitā,
abhibhuyya mārasaṃyogaṃ,
na gacchanti punabbhavan'ti.

components.meaning_1: with a fringe; tasselled; bordered; edged
components.meaning_combo: with a fringe; tasselled; bordered; edged
components.example_1: te evarūpaṃ maṇḍana-vibhūsanaṭṭhān'ānuyogaṃ anuyuttā viharanti, seyyath'idaṃ… hatthabandhaṃ sikhābandhaṃ daṇḍaṃ nāḷikaṃ asiṃ chattaṃ citr'upāhanaṃ uṇhīsaṃ maṇiṃ vālabījaniṃ odātāni vatthāni dīghadasāni
nisīdanaṃ nāma sadasaṃ vuccati.
components.example_2: kārayamānenā'ti karonto vā kārāpento vā pamāṇikaṃ kāretabbaṃ. tatr'idaṃ pamāṇaṃ, dīghaso dve vidatthiyo, sugatavidatthiyā, tiriyaṃ diyaḍḍhaṃ, dasā vidatthi.

components.example_1: dissat'āyaṃ, bhikkhave, cātumahābhūtiko kāyo ekam'pi vassaṃ tiṭṭhamāno dve'pi vassāni tiṭṭhamāno tīṇi'pi vassāni tiṭṭhamāno cattāri'pi vassāni tiṭṭhamāno
components.example_2:
tiṭṭhe ce so tattha anānuyāyī,
pūgam'pi vassānaṃ samantacakkhu,
tatth'eva so sītisiyā vimutto,
cavetha viññāṇaṃ tathāvidhassa.

components.example_1: dissat'āyaṃ, bhikkhave, cātumahābhūtiko kāyo ekam'pi vassaṃ tiṭṭhamāno dve'pi vassāni tiṭṭhamāno tīṇi'pi vassāni tiṭṭhamāno cattāri'pi vassāni tiṭṭhamāno
components.example_2:

pūgam'pi vassānaṃ samantacakkhu,
tatth'eva so sītisiyā vimutto,
cavetha viññāṇaṃ tathāvidhassa.

components.example_2:

data.example_1: yadā arogā ahosi tadā yaṃ iccheyyāsi taṃ dajjeyyāsī'ti
data.example_2:
so bajjhataṃ pāsasatehi chabbhi,
rammā vanā niyyatu rājadhāniṃ,
tuttehi so haññatu pācanehi,
bhisāni te brāhmaṇa yo ahāsi.

data.example_1:
kāyagutto vacīgutto,
āhāre udare yato,
saccaṃ karomi niddānaṃ,
soraccaṃ me pamocanaṃ.
data.example_2:
annañ'ca laddhā vasanañ'ca kāle,
mattaṃ so jaññā idha tosan'atthaṃ,
so tesu gutto yatacāri gāme,
rusito'pi vācaṃ pharusaṃ na vajjā.

data.grammar: ind, adv, abl sg of ya
data.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, udakamaṇiko ādhāre ṭhapito pūro udakassa samatittiko kākapeyyo. tam'enaṃ balavā puriso yato yato āvajjeyya, āgaccheyya udakan'ti? evaṃ, bhante.
data.example_2: evaṃ vutte āyasmā ānando bhagavantaṃ etadavoca, seyyathā'pi, bhante, puriso jighacchādubbalyapareto madhupiṇḍikaṃ adhigaccheyya, so yato yato sāyeyya, labheth'eva sādurasaṃ asecanakaṃ

data.grammar: ind, adv, abl sg of ya
data.meaning_1: since; because; due to the fact that; on account of which
data.meaning_combo: since; because; due to the fact that; on account of which; lit. from which
data.example_1: yato kho, āvuso, ariyasāvako akusalañ'ca pajānāti akusalamūlañ'ca pajānāti kusalañ'ca pajānāti kusalamūlañ'ca pajānāti ettāvatā'pi kho āvuso ariyasāvako sammādiṭṭhi hoti
data.example_2: yato tumhe, bhikkhave, indriyesu guttadvārā viharissatha, atha tumhehipi māro pāpimā nibbijja pakkamissati, otāraṃ alabhamāno, kummamhā'va siṅgālo'ti.

data.grammar: ind, adv, abl sg of ya
data.example_1: yato ca kho so, bhikkhave, bahusampatto hoti, atha taṃ dvāraṃ pidhīyati.
data.example_2: yato kho, kassapa, bhikkhu averaṃ abyāpajjaṃ mettacittaṃ bhāveti, āsavānañ'ca khayā anāsavaṃ cetovimuttiṃ paññāvimuttiṃ diṭṭh'eva dhamme sayaṃ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja viharati.

data.meaning_combo: monk; monastic; renunciant; renunciate; lit. went forth
data.example_1:
khantī paramaṃ tapo titikkhā,
nibbānaṃ paramaṃ vadanti buddhā,
na hi pabbajito par'ūpaghātī,
na samaṇo hoti paraṃ viheṭhayanto.
data.example_2: pañc'imāni, bhikkhave, ṭhānāni abhiṇhaṃ paccavekkhitabbāni itthiyā vā purisena vā gahaṭṭhena vā pabbajitena vā. katamāni pañca?

data.example_1: atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṃ pukkusātiṃ etadavoca, kaṃ'si tvaṃ, bhikkhu, uddissa pabbajito? ko vā te satthā? kassa vā tvaṃ dhammaṃ rocesī'ti?
data.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, khattiyakulā ce'pi agārasmā anagāriyaṃ pabbajito hoti, so ca tathāgatappaveditaṃ dhammavinayaṃ āgamma, evaṃ mettaṃ karuṇaṃ muditaṃ upekkhaṃ bhāvetvā labhati ajjhattaṃ vūpasamaṃ.

data.example_1: puna caparaṃ bhikkhave bhikkhu seyyathā'pi passeyya sarīraṃ sivathikāya chaḍḍitaṃ eka-aha-mataṃ vā dvi-aha-mataṃ vā ti-aha-mataṃ vā uddhumātakaṃ vinīlakaṃ vipubbakajātaṃ
data.example_2:
ākiñcaññaṃ pekkhamāno satimā,
n'atthī'ti nissāya tarassu oghaṃ,
kāme pahāya virato kathāhi,
taṇhakkhayaṃ nattam'aha-abhipassa.

data.example_1: puna caparaṃ bhikkhave bhikkhu seyyathā'pi passeyya sarīraṃ sivathikāya chaḍḍitaṃ eka-aha-mataṃ vā dvi-aha-mataṃ vā ti-aha-mataṃ vā uddhumātakaṃ vinīlakaṃ vipubbakajātaṃ
data.example_2:
ākiñcaññaṃ pekkhamāno satimā,
n'atthī'ti nissāya tarassu oghaṃ,
kāme pahāya virato kathāhi,
taṇhakkhayaṃ nattam'aha-abhipassa.

data.example_1: puna caparaṃ bhikkhave bhikkhu seyyathā'pi passeyya sarīraṃ sivathikāya chaḍḍitaṃ eka-aha-mataṃ vā dvi-aha-mataṃ vā ti-aha-mataṃ vā uddhumātakaṃ vinīlakaṃ vipubbakajātaṃ
data.example_2:
ākiñcaññaṃ pekkhamāno satimā,
n'atthī'ti nissāya tarassu oghaṃ,
kāme pahāya virato kathāhi,
taṇhakkhayaṃ nattam'aha-abhipassa.

data.example_1: atha kho bhagavato etadahosi, sabbe p'ime moghapurisā phuṭṭhā pāpimatā. yatra hi nāma ekassa'pi na evaṃ bhavissati, handa mayaṃ aññāṇ'attham'pi samaṇe gotame brahmacariyaṃ carāma, kiṃ karissati satta-aho'ti?
ahaṃ kho, samaṇa, kasāmi ca vapāmi ca. kasitvā ca vapitvā ca bhuñjāmi. tvam'pi, samaṇa, kasassu ca vapassu ca. kasitvā ca vapitvā ca bhuñjassū'ti.
data.example_2:
yathā ahaṃ tathā ete,
yathā ete tathā ahaṃ,
attānaṃ upamaṃ katvā,
na haneyya na ghātaye.

components.meaning_1: for the time it takes to click the fingers; for a finger snap
components.meaning_combo: for the time it takes to snap the fingers
components.example_1: accharāsaṅghāta-mattam'pi ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhu mettācittaṃ āsevati, ayaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave, bhikkhu arittajjhāno viharati satthusāsanakaro ovādapatikaro, amoghaṃ raṭṭhapiṇḍaṃ bhuñjati. ko pana vādo ye naṃ bahulīkarontī'ti!

components.meaning_combo: Saṃyutta Nikāya 46.36 (SN46.36); lit. discourse on paying proper attention

components.meaning_1: paying proper attention; applying attention in the right way; prudently applying the mind
components.meaning_combo: paying proper attention; applying attention in the right way; prudently applying the mind; lit. making the source in mind
components.example_1: n'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, aññaṃ ekadhammam'pi samanupassāmi yena anuppannā vā vicikicchā n'uppajjati uppannā vā vicikicchā pahīyati yatha'y'idaṃ, bhikkhave, yonisomanasikāro
components.example_2: yonisomanasikāram'p'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, sāhāraṃ vadāmi, no anāhāraṃ. ko c'āhāro yonisomanasikārassa? saddhā'ti'ssa vacanīyaṃ.

components.meaning_combo: properly; prudently; thoroughly; carefully; intelligently; lit. according to the source
components.example_1:
idaṃ pure cittam'acāri cārikaṃ,
yen'icchakaṃ yatthakāmaṃ yathāsukhaṃ,
tadajj'ahaṃ niggahessāmi yoniso,
hatthippabhinnaṃ viya aṅkusaggaho.
components.example_2: ko pana, bhante, hetu ko paccayo kalyāṇassa kammassa kiriyāya kalyāṇassa kammassa pavattiyā'ti?… yoniso manasikāro kho, mahāli, hetu, yoniso manasikāro paccayo kalyāṇassa kammassa kiriyāya kalyāṇassa kammassa pavattiyā.

components.meaning_combo: attention (to); bringing-to-mind; observation; noticing; focussing; lit. making in mind
components.example_1:
ayoniso manasikārā,
maṇḍanaṃ anuyuñjisaṃ,
uddhato capalo c'āsiṃ,
kāmarāgena aṭṭito.
components.example_2: ko pana, bhante, hetu ko paccayo kalyāṇassa kammassa kiriyāya kalyāṇassa kammassa pavattiyā'ti?… yoniso manasikāro kho, mahāli, hetu, yoniso manasikāro paccayo kalyāṇassa kammassa kiriyāya kalyāṇassa kammassa pavattiyā.

components.example_1:
santaṃ tassa manaṃ hoti,
santā vācā ca kamma ca,
samma'd'aññā vimuttassa,
upasantassa tādino.
components.example_2: yañ'ca kho etaṃ bhikkhave vuccati cittaṃ iti'pi mano iti'pi viññāṇaṃ iti'pi tatr'āssutavā puthujjano n'ālaṃ nibbindituṃ n'ālaṃ virajjituṃ n'ālaṃ vimuccituṃ

components.example_1: yesañ'ca mayaṃ cīvara-piṇḍapāta-sen'āsana-gilānappaccaya-bhesajja-parikkhāraṃ paribhuñjāma, tesaṃ te kārā amhesu mahapphalā bhavissanti mah'ānisaṃsā
components.example_2: dassanam'p'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, tesaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ bahukāraṃ vadāmi

components.example_1:
anekajātisaṃsāraṃ,
sandhāvissaṃ anibbisaṃ, 
gahakāraṃ gavesanto,
dukkhā jāti punappunaṃ.
tam'enaṃ suvaṇṇakāro vā suvaṇṇakār'antevāsī vā jātarūpaṃ mūsāyaṃ pakkhipitvā dhamati sandhamati niddhamati.
tulanāya pana, bho gotama, katamo dhammo bahukāro? tulanāya bahukāraṃ dhammaṃ mayaṃ bhavantaṃ gotamaṃ pucchāmā'ti.
components.example_2: tatth'āyaṃ samayo, cīvaradānasamayo, cīvarakārasamayo, ayaṃ tattha samayo.

components.example_1: na, bhikkhave, kārabhedako coro pabbājetabbo. yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā'ti.
na, bhikkhave, kārabhedako coro pabbājetabbo. yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā'ti.

components.meaning_combo: scripture; discourse; sacred text; lit. thread
components.example_1: sammukhā ce'pi mayaṃ, bho bhāradvāja, taṃ bhavantaṃ gotamaṃ passeyyāma, sammukhā'pi naṃ vadeyyāma, bhūnahu samaṇo gotamo'ti. taṃ kissa hetu? evañ'hi no sutte ocaratī'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekacce moghapurisā dhammaṃ pariyāpuṇanti, suttaṃ, geyyaṃ, veyyākaraṇaṃ, gāthaṃ, udānaṃ, itivuttakaṃ, jātakaṃ, abbhutadhammaṃ, vedallaṃ.

components.example_1: yo pana bhikkhu sāmaṃ suttaṃ viññāpetvā tantavāyehi cīvaraṃ vāyāpeyya, nissaggiyaṃ pācittiyaṃ.
components.example_2: veṇī nāma suddhakesā vā, suttamissā vā, mālāmissā vā, hiraññamissā vā, suvaṇṇamissā vā, muttāmissā vā, maṇimissā vā.

components.example_1:
appamatto pamattesu,
suttesu bahujāgaro,
abal'assaṃ'va sīgh'asso,
hitvā yāti sumedhaso.
components.example_2:
kati jāgarataṃ suttā,
kati suttesu jāgarā,
katibhi rajam'ādeti,
katibhi parisujjhatī'ti.

components.example_1: evaṃ vutte, mahānāma, te nigaṇṭhā maṃ etadavocuṃ, nigaṇṭho, āvuso, nāṭaputto sabbaññū sabbadassāvī aparisesaṃ ñāṇadassanaṃ paṭijānāti, carato ca me tiṭṭhato ca suttassa ca jāgarassa ca satataṃ samitaṃ ñāṇadassanaṃ paccupaṭṭhitan'ti.
asite pīte khāyite sāyite sampajānakārī ahosiṃ, uccārapassāvakamme sampajānakārī ahosiṃ, gate ṭhite nisinne sutte jāgarite bhāsite tuṇhībhāve sampajānakārī ahosiṃ.
components.example_2: idān'eva kho ahaṃ ājānāmi, ayam'pi kira dhammo, sutt'āgato suttapariyāpanno, anvaddhamāsaṃ uddesaṃ āgacchatī'ti

components.meaning_1: amount of; as many as; measure of; consisting of
components.example_1:
paṇṇavīsativassāni,
yato pabbajitā ahaṃ,
n'āccharāsaṅghātamattam'pi,
cittass'ūpasam'ajjhagaṃ.
components.example_2: savitakkasavicārā dhammā. avitakkavicāramattā dhammā. avitakk'āvicārā dhammā.

components.meaning_combo: size of; as big as; lit. measured
components.example_1: kalāyamattiyo hutvā kol'aṭṭhimattiyo ahesuṃ, kol'aṭṭhimattiyo hutvā kolamattiyo ahesuṃ, kolamattiyo hutvā āmalakamattiyo ahesuṃ, āmalakamattiyo hutvā beluvasalāṭukamattiyo ahesuṃ, beluvasalāṭukamattiyo hutvā billamattiyo ahesuṃ, billamattiyo hutvā pabhijjiṃsu. pubbañ'ca lohitañ'ca pagghariṃsu.

components.meaning_1: mere; simple; the fact of; by virtue of
components.meaning_combo: mere; simple; the fact of; by virtue of; lit. measured
components.example_1:
na vākkaraṇamattena,
vaṇṇapokkharatāya vā,
sādhurūpo naro hoti,
issukī maccharī saṭho.
components.example_2: n'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, jaṭilakassa jaṭādhāraṇamattena sāmaññaṃ vadāmi.

components.meaning_combo: so much; some; enough (of); sufficient; lit. measured
components.example_1: evaṃ svākkhāte, bhikkhave, mayā dhamme uttāne vivaṭe pakāsite chinnapilotike yesaṃ mayi saddhāmattaṃ pemamattaṃ sabbe te saggaparāyanā'ti
components.example_2: tathāgate c'assa saddhāmattaṃ hoti pemamattaṃ, api c'assa ime dhammā honti

components.meaning_1: as soon as; no sooner than
components.meaning_combo: as soon as; no sooner than; lit. measured
components.example_1: tassa ekādasahatthena pādena dvādasahatthāya kaṇṇikāya akkantamattāya navaghaṭappamāṇo reṇu uṭṭhāya aṭṭhapaṇṇāsahatthaṃ padesaṃ uggantvā okiṇṇamanosilācuṇṇaṃ viya paccokiṇṇo.
atthi, bhikkhave, sattānaṃ yobbane yobbanamado, yena madena mattā kāyena duccaritaṃ caranti, vācāya duccaritaṃ caranti, manasā duccaritaṃ caranti.
components.example_2:
atisāradiṭṭhiyā'va so samatto,
mānena matto paripuṇṇamānī,
sayam'eva sāmaṃ manas'ābhisitto,
diṭṭhī hi sā tassa tathā samattā.

components.meaning_1: (of an elephant) in musth; in rut; sexually inflamed; experiencing a testosterone surge
components.meaning_combo: (of an elephant) in musth; in rut; sexually inflamed; experiencing a testosterone surge; lit. intoxicated
components.example_1:
tathā tu kassāmi yathā'pi issaro,
yaṃ labbhati tena'pi hotu me alaṃ,
vīriyena taṃ mayha vas'ānayissaṃ,
gajaṃ'va mattaṃ kusal'aṅkusaggaho.
components.example_2:
yogīpītikaraṃ rammaṃ,
mattakuñjarasevitaṃ,
eko attavasī khippaṃ,
pavisissāmi kānanaṃ.

components.example_1: tasmā't'iha, bhikkhave, setughāto gīte, setughāto nacce, alaṃ vo dhammappamoditānaṃ sataṃ sitaṃ sitamattāyā'ti.

mattā vaṇṇena rūpena,
sobhaggena yasena ca,
yobbanena c'upatthaddhā,
aññāsam'atimaññi'haṃ.
imāya ca, kassapa, mattāya iminā tapopakkamena sāmaññaṃ vā abhavissa brahmaññaṃ vā dukkaraṃ sudukkaraṃ, n'etaṃ abhavissa kallaṃ vacanāya, dukkaraṃ sāmaññaṃ dukkaraṃ brahmaññan'ti.

sītavātaparittāṇaṃ,
hirikopīnachādanaṃ,
matt'aṭṭhiyaṃ abhuñjiṃsu,
santuṭṭhā itar'ītare.

bahussuto ca medhāvī,
sīlesu susamāhito,
cetosamatham'anuyutto,
api muddhani tiṭṭhatu.

api dibbesu kāmesu,
ratiṃ so n'ādhigacchati,
taṇhakkhayarato hoti,
sammāsambuddhasāvako.
components.example_2:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.

components.example_1: sacc'āhaṃ, ācariya, paṭissuṇiṃ, api-ahaṃ marissāmi, n'āhaṃ sakkomi ekena passena sattamāse nipajjitun'ti
components.example_2:
yathā'pi mūle anupaddave daḷhe,
chinno'pi rukkho punareva rūhati, 
evam'pi taṇh'ānusaye anūhate,
nibbattatī dukkham'idaṃ punappunaṃ.

components.example_1: api, samaṇa, balībadde addasā'ti?
components.example_2: addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṃ bhikkhuṃ kīṭāgirismiṃ piṇḍāya carantaṃ. disvāna yena so bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ abhivādetvā etadavoca, api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī'ti?

components.example_1: api ca, udāyi, ānando diṭṭh'eva dhamme parinibbāyissatī'ti
yam'pi taṃ diṭṭhaṃ sutaṃ mutaṃ viññātaṃ pattaṃ pariyesitaṃ, anuvicaritaṃ manasā tam'pi etaṃ mama, eso'ham'asmi, eso me attā'ti samanupassati
so tena ñattena attān'ukkaṃseti, paraṃ vambheti. ayam'pi, bhikkhave, asappurisadhammo.

yato pabbajito ahaṃ,
accharāsaṅghāta-mattam'pi,
cetosantim'anajjhagaṃ.
so sace ākaṅkhati, parasattānaṃ parapuggalānaṃ cetasā ceto paricca pajāneyyaṃ
components.example_2: te'dha bhikkhū aṭṭhiṃ katvā manasi katvā sabbaṃ cetaso samannāharitvā ohitasotā dhammaṃ suṇanti

components.example_1: so sace ākaṅkhati, parasattānaṃ parapuggalānaṃ cetasā ceto paricca pajāneyyaṃ
components.example_2: te'dha bhikkhū aṭṭhiṃ katvā manasi katvā sabbaṃ cetaso samannāharitvā ohitasotā dhammaṃ suṇanti

components.example_1: idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu cakkhunā rūpaṃ disvā piyarūpe rūpe adhimuccati, appiyarūpe rūpe byāpajjati, anupaṭṭhitakāyassati ca viharati parittacetaso.
atthi, bhikkhave, ajātaṃ abhūtaṃ akataṃ asaṅkhataṃ
components.example_2:
paccati munino bhattaṃ,
thokaṃ thokaṃ kule kule,
piṇḍikāya carissāmi,
atthi jaṅghābalaṃ mamā'ti.

components.meaning_1: own; one's own; one's own possession
components.meaning_combo: own; one's own; one's own possession
components.example_1:
ayasāva malaṃ samuṭṭhitaṃ,
tat'uṭṭhāya tam'eva khādati,
evaṃ atidhonacārinaṃ sāni,
kammāni nayanti duggatiṃ.
components.example_2:
parassa ce vambhayitena hīno,
na koci dhammesu visesi assa,
puthū hi aññassa vadanti dhammaṃ,
nihīnato sam'hi daḷhaṃ vadānā.

components.example_1:
niddaṃ na bahulīkareyya,
jāgariyaṃ bhajeyya ātāpī,
tandiṃ māyaṃ hassaṃ khiḍḍaṃ,
methunaṃ vippajahe savibhūsaṃ.
seyyathā'pi nāma sā gaddulabaddho daḷhe thambhe vā khile vā upanibaddho tam'eva thambhaṃ vā khilaṃ vā anuparidhāvati anuparivattati
components.example_2: na saṅkittīsu na yattha sā upaṭṭhito hoti na yattha makkhikā saṇḍasaṇḍacārinī, na macchaṃ na maṃsaṃ na suraṃ na merayaṃ na thus'odakaṃ pivanti.

components.example_1:
socanti janā mamāyite,
na hi santi niccā pariggahā,
vinābhāva'santam'ev'idaṃ,
iti disvā n'āgāram'āvase.
components.example_2: so ñātakehi nīyamāno appatvā'va ñātake antarāmagge kālaṃ karoti. evarūpo'pi, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco yodh'ājīvo hoti. ayaṃ, bhikkhave, dutiyo yodh'ājīvo santo saṃvijjamāno lokasmiṃ.

components.example_1: kiṃ saṅghassa pubbakiccaṃ? pārisuddhiṃ āyasmanto ārocetha, pātimokkhaṃ uddisissāmi, taṃ sabb'eva santā sādhukaṃ suṇoma manasi karoma.

components.meaning_1: virtuous man; good person; wise person; sage
components.meaning_combo: virtuous man; good person; wise person; sage
components.example_1:
tasmā pattapuṭass'eva,
ñatvā sampākam'attano,
asante n'upaseveyya,
sante seveyya paṇḍito,
asanto nirayaṃ nenti,
santo pāpenti suggatin'ti.
components.example_2:
yaṃ kiñci dhammam'abhijaññā,
ajjhattaṃ athavā'pi bahiddhā,
na tena thāmaṃ kubbetha,
na hi sā nibbuti sataṃ vuttā.

components.example_1:
uṭṭhahatha nisīdatha,
daḷhaṃ sikkhatha santiyā,
mā vo pamatte viññāya,
maccurājā amohayittha vas'ānuge.
components.example_2:
etañ'ca dhammam'aññāya,
vicinaṃ bhikkhu sadā sato sikkhe,
santī'ti nibbutiṃ ñatvā,
sāsane gotamassa na pamajjeyya.

components.example_1:
yāya mātu bhato poso,
imaṃ lokaṃ avekkhati,
tam'pi pāṇadadiṃ santiṃ,
hanti kuddho puthujjano.
components.example_2: santi idh'ekacce khattiyā, brāhmaṇā'ti bhaṇati

components.example_2: so ñātakehi nīyamāno appatvā'va ñātake antarāmagge kālaṃ karoti. evarūpo'pi, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco yodh'ājīvo hoti. ayaṃ, bhikkhave, dutiyo yodh'ājīvo santo saṃvijjamāno lokasmiṃ.

components.example_1:
socanti janā mamāyite,
na hi santi niccā pariggahā,
vinābhāva'santam'ev'idaṃ,
iti disvā n'āgāram'āvase.
components.example_2: so ñātakehi nīyamāno appatvā'va ñātake antarāmagge kālaṃ karoti. evarūpo'pi, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco yodh'ājīvo hoti. ayaṃ, bhikkhave, dutiyo yodh'ājīvo santo saṃvijjamāno lokasmiṃ.

components.example_1: kiṃ saṅghassa pubbakiccaṃ? pārisuddhiṃ āyasmanto ārocetha, pātimokkhaṃ uddisissāmi, taṃ sabb'eva santā sādhukaṃ suṇoma manasi karoma.
kiṃ saṅghassa pubbakiccaṃ? pārisuddhiṃ āyasmanto ārocetha, pātimokkhaṃ uddisissāmi, taṃ sabb'eva santā sādhukaṃ suṇoma manasi karoma.

components.meaning_1: virtuous man; good person; wise person; sage
components.meaning_combo: virtuous man; good person; wise person; sage
components.example_1:
tasmā pattapuṭass'eva,
ñatvā sampākam'attano,
asante n'upaseveyya,
sante seveyya paṇḍito,
asanto nirayaṃ nenti,
santo pāpenti suggatin'ti.
components.example_2:
yaṃ kiñci dhammam'abhijaññā,
ajjhattaṃ athavā'pi bahiddhā,
na tena thāmaṃ kubbetha,
na hi sā nibbuti sataṃ vuttā.

components.meaning_1: virtuous man; good person; wise person; sage
components.meaning_combo: virtuous man; good person; wise person; sage
components.example_1:
tasmā pattapuṭass'eva,
ñatvā sampākam'attano,
asante n'upaseveyya,

asanto nirayaṃ nenti,

ajjhattaṃ athavā'pi bahiddhā,
na tena thāmaṃ kubbetha,

components.example_1: tatr'idaṃ, bho gotama, brāhmaṇā brāhmaṇassa sandhanaṃ paññapenti bhikkhācariyaṃ, bhikkhācariyañ'ca pana brāhmaṇo sandhanaṃ atimaññamāno akiccakārī hoti gopo'va adinnaṃ ādiyamāno'ti.

components.meaning_1: could be; may be; might be; should be
components.meaning_combo: could be; may be; might be; should be
components.example_1:
kāmesu n'ābhigijjheyya,
manas'ānāvilo siyā,
kusalo sabbadhammānaṃ,
sato bhikkhu paribbaje'ti.
components.example_2:
padumaṃ yathā kokanadaṃ sugandhaṃ,
pāto siyā phullam'avītagandhaṃ,
aṅgīrasaṃ passa virocamānaṃ,
tapantam'ādiccam'iv'antalikkhe'ti.

components.example_1: app'eva nāma mayaṃ kadāci karahaci tena bhotā gotamena samāgaccheyyāma? app'eva nāma siyā koci'd'eva kathāsallāpo'ti!
components.example_2:
araññe rukkhamūle vā,
suññ'āgāre'va bhikkhavo,
anussaretha sambuddhaṃ,
bhayaṃ tumhāka no siyā.

components.meaning_1: thus; like this; this is; and so
components.meaning_combo: thus; like this; this is; and so
components.example_1: iti kho, bhikkhave, na'y'idaṃ brahmacariyaṃ lābhasakkārasilok'ānisaṃsaṃ na sīlasampad'ānisaṃsaṃ na samādhisampad'ānisaṃsaṃ na ñāṇadassan'ānisaṃsaṃ
components.example_2:
akiñcanaṃ anādānaṃ,
etaṃ dīpaṃ anāparaṃ,
nibbānaṃ iti naṃ brūmi,
jarāmaccuparikkhayaṃ.

components.example_1: tatr'idaṃ, bho gotama, brāhmaṇā brāhmaṇassa sandhanaṃ paññapenti bhikkhācariyaṃ, bhikkhācariyañ'ca pana brāhmaṇo sandhanaṃ atimaññamāno akiccakārī hoti gopo'va adinnaṃ ādiyamāno'ti.

components.meaning_1: did not get; did not obtain; did not achieve; did not experience
components.example_1:
paṇṇavīsativassāni,
yato pabbajito ahaṃ,
accharāsaṅghāta-mattam'pi,
cetosantim'anajjhagaṃ.

verse_text:
paṇṇavīsativassāni,
yato pabbajito ahaṃ,
accharā-saṅghāta-mattam'pi,
cetosantim'anajjhagaṃ.
